thesis.core_idea: IndiaMART is India's leading B2B e-commerce marketplace with strong unit economics, consistent profitability, and significant growth runway in SME digitization
thesis.growth_driver: B2B marketplace consolidation, increasing supplier realization, merchant growth, and expansion in smaller cities
thesis.edge: First-mover advantage in B2B space, strong supplier network, superior ROCE >15%, low debt, and improving profitability margins
thesis.trigger: Sustained margin expansion, acceleration in supplier growth, and potential path to 20%+ EPS growth as marketplace matures

valuation.margin_of_safety: Moderate discount; entry opportunity as stock corrected 13% from entry

timing.price_vs_200dma: Trading below 200-day moving average; technical weakness post recent sell-off
timing.fii_trend: Mixed; analyst downgrades noted but fundamentals remain intact

capital_efficiency.roic_trend: Stable and improving, with consistent returns above cost of capital
capital_efficiency.reinvestment_quality: High; company reinvests profits efficiently into platform expansion and technology

structural_risks: Competitive threat from larger e-commerce players entering B2B
Market saturation in organized B2B space
cyclical_risks: SME credit cycles affecting customer spending
company_risks: Recent analyst downgrade to 'sell' citing technical weakness
Flat H1 FY26 performance indicates slowdown
Execution risk on margin expansion targets

next_triggers: Q4 FY25 and H1 FY26 growth acceleration
Margin expansion trajectory toward 20% net profit margin
Price recovery toward 2400-2650 fair value range
Resolution of analyst sentiment vs. fundamental strength
red_flags: Further margin compression or profitability slowdown

data_sources: ET Retail - Q4 FY25 Results Analysis
MarketsMojo - Recent news and analyst commentary
